violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025

The ceiling tiles on the sales floor are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor coving in the restroom area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/09/2025
